◎简　　介  

　　Season one (10 episodes) of the show features on aging master Sensei Wu as he struggles to train four young Ninja in the ways of an ancient battle art called Spinjitzu to defeat his evil brother Lord Garmadon, ruler[but not king] of the underworld, and stop him from gaining four golden weapons which would make his power limitless. Though many skeleton characters are introduced,...
